name: Leeuwin Metals Ltd
analysis: LM1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.2100. Trade idea: entry A$0.2100, stop A$0.1732, target A$0.3202 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
